competitors.name: Kajabi
competitors.short_description: All-in-one platform for courses, coaching, podcasts, and memberships with built-in marketing.
competitors.description: All-in-one course platform with built-in marketing, email, and funnels. Premium pricing.
competitors.differentiator: All-in-one with built-in email, funnels, and marketing. Premium price point.

competitors.name: Thinkific
competitors.short_description: Course creation platform with strong assessment tools and a free tier.
competitors.description: Course creation platform with free tier. Strong quiz/assessment tools. No transaction fees on most plans.
competitors.differentiator: Free tier, strong assessments, no transaction fees on most plans.

competitors.name: Podia
competitors.short_description: Simple platform for courses, digital downloads, coaching, and community.
competitors.description: Simple all-in-one platform for courses, digital downloads, coaching, and community.
competitors.differentiator: Simple and affordable. Courses, downloads, coaching, community in one.

competitors.name: LearnWorlds
competitors.short_description: Course platform with interactive video, SCORM support, and white-label options.
competitors.description: Course platform with interactive video, SCORM support, and white-label options.
competitors.differentiator: Interactive video, SCORM support, white-label. Mid-market positioning.

competitors.name: Skool
competitors.short_description: Community-first platform pairing courses with group engagement. Flat $99/mo.
competitors.description: Community-first platform combining courses with group community features. Flat $99/mo pricing.
competitors.differentiator: Community-first. Flat $99/mo. Courses are secondary to the group experience.

competitors.name: Mighty Networks
competitors.short_description: Community platform with courses, events, and branded mobile apps.
competitors.description: Community-centric platform with courses, events, and branded mobile apps.
competitors.differentiator: Branded mobile apps, community-centric. Higher price tiers.

competitors.name: Kartra
competitors.short_description: Marketing-focused platform with funnels, email, helpdesk, and course hosting.
competitors.description: All-in-one marketing platform with course hosting, funnels, email, and helpdesk.
competitors.differentiator: Marketing-heavy. Funnels, email, helpdesk, plus course hosting.

competitors.name: Docebo
competitors.short_description: Enterprise AI-powered LMS for corporate training and compliance.
competitors.description: Enterprise LMS for corporate training and compliance. AI-powered learning platform.
competitors.differentiator: Enterprise LMS. AI-powered. Corporate training and compliance focused.

competitors.name: TalentLMS
competitors.short_description: Cloud LMS for SMB employee training, onboarding, and compliance.
competitors.description: Cloud-based LMS for employee training, onboarding, and compliance. SCORM/xAPI support.
competitors.differentiator: Cloud LMS for SMB. Employee training, onboarding, SCORM/xAPI.

competitors.name: Absorb LMS
competitors.short_description: Enterprise LMS for employee and customer training with compliance tracking.
competitors.description: Enterprise LMS focused on employee and customer training with compliance tracking.
competitors.differentiator: Enterprise LMS. Employee and customer training with compliance tracking.

competitors.name: Moodle
competitors.short_description: Open-source LMS widely used by universities and institutions.
competitors.description: Open-source LMS used by universities and institutions. Self-hosted or cloud.
competitors.differentiator: Open-source, self-hosted. University and institutional standard.

competitors.name: Canvas LMS
competitors.short_description: Instructure's LMS dominant in higher education and K-12.
competitors.description: Instructure's LMS for higher education and K-12. Widely adopted by universities.
competitors.differentiator: Instructure's LMS. Dominant in higher ed and K-12.

competitors.name: WordPress + LMS Plugin
competitors.short_description: Self-hosted WordPress with LearnDash or LifterLMS. DIY approach.
competitors.description: Self-hosted WordPress with LearnDash, LifterLMS, or similar plugin. DIY approach.
competitors.differentiator: DIY approach. Flexible but requires technical maintenance.

competitors.name: ClickFunnels
competitors.short_description: Sales funnel builder sometimes used to sell courses.
competitors.description: Sales funnel builder sometimes used to sell courses. Not a dedicated course platform.
competitors.differentiator: Sales funnel builder. Not a course platform but sometimes used as one.

competitors.name: Udemy
competitors.short_description: Course marketplace with built-in audience but limited creator control.
competitors.description: Course marketplace. Prospects may mention as where they started before wanting their own platform.
competitors.differentiator: Marketplace model. Built-in audience but limited branding and pricing control.

competitors.name: Skillshare
competitors.short_description: Subscription-based creative skills marketplace with revenue share model.
competitors.description: Subscription-based course marketplace for creative skills.
competitors.differentiator: Subscription marketplace for creative skills. Revenue share model.

competitors.name: Credly
competitors.short_description: Digital credentials and badges platform for verifiable achievements.
competitors.description: Digital badges and Open Badge-compliant credentials platform by Pearson.
competitors.differentiator: Blockchain-verified badges shareable on LinkedIn. Not a course platform.

competitors.name: WooCommerce
competitors.short_description: Open-source WordPress ecommerce plugin for selling digital and physical goods.
competitors.description: WordPress ecommerce plugin sometimes used with course plugins to sell courses.
competitors.differentiator: Free, open-source ecommerce. Flexible but requires WordPress + plugins.

competitors.name: WapCRM
competitors.short_description: WhatsApp and Instagram CRM with unified inbox, sales automation, and omnichannel support. Targets e-commerce, healthcare, and small business.
competitors.description: WhatsApp/Instagram-focused CRM with unified inbox, sales automation, omnichannel messaging, and customer scoring.
competitors.differentiator: Omnichannel CRM for WhatsApp/Instagram. Not a course platform — adjacent tool for customer communication.

competitors.name: Articulate 360
competitors.short_description: Industry-standard e-learning authoring suite with Storyline, Rise, and Review.
competitors.description: E-learning authoring platform with Storyline (interactive), Rise (responsive), and Review (collaboration). Enterprise standard for SCORM/xAPI content.
competitors.differentiator: Authoring-focused, not a delivery platform. Creates SCORM/xAPI content hosted elsewhere.

competitors.name: TagMango
competitors.short_description: India-based creator platform for courses, workshops, memberships, and communities.
competitors.description: Creator platform for live workshops, pre-recorded courses, memberships, and communities. Strong in Indian/Asian markets with localized payment options. 6,700+ creators, $112M+ in sales.
competitors.differentiator: India-first with localized payments. Low-cost all-in-one for creators in emerging markets.

competitor_types.direct: Direct course platform competitors (same market, same buyer)
competitor_types.lms: Traditional LMS platforms (often comes up in CE/corporate segment)
competitor_types.adjacent: Adjacent tools sometimes used for courses
competitor_types.marketplace: Course marketplaces (different model but prospects mention them)
